title: daboecia polifolia var. bicolor
intro: Daboecia polifolia var. bicolor, also known as the white heath or white daboecia, is a flowering plant belonging to the heath family and native to Ireland. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Consuming the plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving respiratory function, as well as acting as a natural expectorant to help relieve congestion. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties.
